Class BaseJelly

java.lang.Object
Main.ObjectInGame.Jelly.BaseJelly
All Implemented Interfaces:
Interactable
public class BaseJelly extends Object implements Interactable
Represents a basic jelly object in the game that the player can collect. Each jelly has a name and a score value that will be added to the game when the player interacts with it.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    BaseJelly(String name)
    Creates a BaseJelly with the specified name.

  • Constructor Details

    • BaseJelly

      public BaseJelly(String name)
      Creates a BaseJelly with the specified name. The score value is determined based on the jelly name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the jelly

  • Method Details

    • interact

      public void interact(Cookie cookie)
      Handles the interaction between the player and the jelly. When collected, the jelly adds its score value to the game score.
      Specified by:
      interact in interface Interactable
      Parameters:
      cookie - the Cookie that interacts with the jelly

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the name of the jelly.
      Returns:
      the jelly name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Sets the name of the jelly.
      Parameters:
      name - the new jelly name

    • getScore

      public int getScore()
      Returns the score awarded by this jelly.
      Returns:
      the score value

    • setScore

      public void setScore(int score)
      Sets the score awarded by this jelly.
      Parameters:
      score - the new score value
